title: T-054 — UI: Labels + Genealogy traceability — WH-013/WH-014 (WH §11.1, §11.5, §15.1)
prompt:
# T-054 — UI: Labels + Genealogy traceability — WH-013/WH-014 (WH §11.1, §11.5, §15.1)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §11.1, §11.5, §15.1, §15.6, §16.6 WH-013/014
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:667-745 (label_print_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:268-359 (genealogy_traceability_page)

## Goal
Implement label_print_modal + /(app)/warehouse/genealogy page with 1:1 prototype parity, printer-online guard, FSMA-204 PDF/CSV export, depth slider, FEFO-compliance badge per consume node.

## Implementation contract
1. Label modal: HTML preview (BL-WH-04 — not real ZPL; real ZPL handled by T-043 backend), printer Select (live online status), copies (1-10), queue checkbox, reprint history.
2. Genealogy page: search by LP / batch / supplier_batch / scan; mode toggle (forward/backward/full); depth slider 1-10; tree view (default) + list view; per-node FEFO-compliance badge; Export Trace Report (PDF/CSV) via Server Action; Suspense + cancel button for long queries.
3. Both root elements expose `data-prototype-label`.

## Files
- apps/web/components/warehouse/labels/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/genealogy/** [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx

## Prototype parity
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:667-745 (label_print_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:268-359 (genealogy_traceability_page)
- Evidence policy: _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the label_print_modal renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:667-745 (label_print_modal), then preview + printer select + copies + queue match; non-real-ZPL preview labelled as 'HTML preview only — production ZPL via printer service'.
2. Given /warehouse/genealogy renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx:268-359 (genealogy_traceability_page), then search, mode toggle, depth slider, tree/list views match; query executes via T-038 (recursive CTE).
3. Given depth=10 is exceeded by request, when called, then UI clamps to 10 and shows warning (V-WH-TRACE-005).
4. Given the Export Trace Report is clicked, when complete, then a PDF/CSV is generated via Server Action (FSMA 204 format).

Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a 5th AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F6 2026-05-14).

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright + RTL covering 2 labels, depth guard, FEFO-compliance badge, export action.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test warehouse-labels-genealogy-ui && pnpm playwright test --project=chromium --grep @warehouse-labels-genealogy-ui`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not render real ZPL in the browser; preview is HTML-only (BL-WH-04).
- Do not skip depth cap (V-WH-TRACE-005).
- Do not compute FEFO compliance client-side — derive from pick_overrides annotation in T-038.

## Dependencies
- T-038
- T-043
